items.headline: City Council to study updates to Health and Safety Element of General Plan
items.summary: The City Council is scheduled to hold a study session on updating the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's General Plan (2015–2040 Community Vision). This update will shape how the city addresses health and safety considerations in land use, development, and community planning over the next decade.

items.headline: Venture Dock and Falcon X receive permits at 555 University
items.summary: Two companies receive signage permits and a new use and occupancy approval at 555 University Avenue, indicating a business name change or tenant turnover at this central Palo Alto location.

items.headline: Four new homes permitted in Comm Hill Phase 3.1 development
items.summary: Four single-family homes received building permits on Altino Boulevard as part of the Comm Hill Phase 3.1 development, ranging from $413,712 to $512,234.
